description_long: This is a classic-style motorcycle with a yellow fuel tank and side panels, contrasted by a black seat and frame. The front features a round headlight, two round mirrors, and orange turn signals, while the rear includes a red taillight and additional turn signals. The motorcycle is equipped with spoked wheels, a visible exhaust pipe on the right side, and a center stand for parking. The engine and transmission components are exposed, with metallic finishes and visible branding on the side cover. The handlebars are upright with standard grips and control levers, and the instrument cluster includes two round gauges. The overall design suggests a vintage or retro-inspired urban commuter bike.
description: A yellow and black classic motorcycle with spoked wheels, round headlight, and upright handlebars, featuring retro styling and visible engine components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlight, two mirrors, and orange turn signals, with the front wheel and fork clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the yellow fuel tank, black seat, spoked wheels, and the engine with visible branding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red taillight, rear turn signals, and the full length of the seat and rear fender.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust pipe, engine, and the overall profile of the motorcycle with its classic lines.
